query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url, u.created_at, u.updated_at
            FROM users u
            WHERE u.id IN (
                SELECT u2.id
                FROM users u2
                LEFT JOIN user_emails ue ON ue.user_id = u2.id
                WHERE u2.username % $1
                   OR ue.email % $1
            )
            ORDER BY similarity(u.username, $1) DESC
            LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3
